template_module.title: GOV.UK Component Guidance Template
template_module.description: Template for summarising usage guidance for a GOV.UK Design System component. It instructs the assistant to look up the named component in the reference module and provide guidance on when to use it, when not to use it, how it works and any important variations or behaviours.

body.instruction: Refer to the GOV.UK Design System reference module to gather information about the component named "{{component}}". Summarise the following points:

checklist.entry: When not to use the component
How the component works and where it should be placed on a page
Any required behaviours such as fallbacks when JavaScript is unavailable
Variations, including classes for dark backgrounds or other states

body.instruction: Include citations from the reference module to support each point. If the component is not defined in the reference, state that guidance is not yet available.
